name: maestro
description: Multi-agent development orchestration platform — 12 specialists, 4-phase orchestration, parallel dispatch, persistent sessions, and standalone review/debug/security/perf commands

settings.name: Default Model
settings.description: Override the model for parallel-dispatched agents (e.g., gemini-2.5-pro). Sequential subagent delegation inherits the main session model.

settings.name: Writer Model
settings.description: Override the model for the technical-writer agent in parallel dispatch only
